title: melilotus macrocarpus
intro: Melilotus macrocarpus, also known as large sweet clover, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The plant is rich in isoflavones and coumarins, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving digestion. Melilotus macrocarpus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
